description: A process engineer wants to determine if the blending time for a product can be reduced without affecting homogeneity, in order to increase throughput.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve historical data for the last 20 batches of the product, including blending time and final QC results for homogeneity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully gathers the required historical data.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data to see if there is a correlation between blending time and homogeneity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's analysis shows that homogeneity is achieved well before the standard 60-minute blend time.

nodes.task_description: Submit a change request to reduce the standard blending time in the recipe from 60 minutes to 45 minutes for a trial period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a change control request to update the master recipe.
